compiled_state.title: RED: Add test assertions for onboarding auto-detection, config completeness, and Socratic dialogue
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description
Add new test assertions to tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh that will fail (RED) against the current SKILL.md. These assertions validate the new auto-detection, config completeness, Socratic dialogue anti-pattern, fallback behavior, CI workflow confirmation, config merge, and Jira bridge requirements.

## File Impact
- MODIFY: tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh

## New Test Assertions to Add
1. test_auto_detection_before_asking: SKILL.md must instruct reading project files (package.json, .husky/, .github/workflows/) BEFORE asking questions — grep for 'auto-detect' or 'read.*before.*ask' or 'detect.*before.*question'
2. test_config_key_completeness: SKILL.md must reference ALL required config keys: dso.plugin_root, format.extensions, format.source_dirs, test_gate.test_dirs, commands.validate, tickets.directory, checkpoint.marker_file, review.behavioral_patterns — must find at least 6 of 8
3. test_absolute_path_requirement: SKILL.md must mention absolute path for dso.plugin_root — grep for 'absolute.*path' or 'realpath' near 'plugin_root'
4. test_semicolon_delimited_format: SKILL.md must document semicolon-delimited format for review.behavioral_patterns — grep for 'semicolon'
5. test_fallback_behavior: SKILL.md must describe fallback when config cannot be auto-detected — grep for 'fallback' or 'default' or 'omit.*comment'
6. test_ci_workflow_filename_confirmation: SKILL.md must instruct listing actual workflow filenames — grep for 'workflow.*filename' or 'list.*workflow' or '.yml'
7. test_config_merge_existing: SKILL.md must instruct detecting and merging with existing dso-config.conf — grep for 'merge' or 'existing.*config' or 'diff'
8. test_jira_bridge_project_key: SKILL.md must mention Jira project key (not credentials) — grep for 'jira.*project.*key' or 'project_key'
9. test_no_rigid_multiple_choice: SKILL.md must NOT contain rigid quiz-style instruction patterns — grep for evidence of 'confirm.*detection' rather than 'select.*option' style

## TDD Requirement
All new tests must FAIL when run against the current SKILL.md (RED state). Run after adding assertions to confirm they fail.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh 2>&1 | tail -3
- [ ] New test assertions exist in test-onboarding-skill.sh
  Verify: grep -c 'test_auto_detection\|test_config_key_completeness\|test_absolute_path\|test_semicolon\|test_fallback\|test_ci_workflow_filename\|test_config_merge\|test_jira_bridge\|test_no_rigid' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 7)}'
- [ ] New assertions fail against current SKILL.md (RED confirmed)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh 2>&1 | grep -c FAIL | awk '{exit ($1 < 5)}'
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
